title: Translate the chapters that need it into English
persona: N-T (fan translator) / P1 Mai — near-zero platform knowledge
fixture: REQUIRED: a book with source chapters + an English target, SOME already translated and SOME new/changed (dirty) — SKILL_BOOK_ID
fixture_note: The crux of S05 is 'only redo what changed' + async honesty + cost-before-spend. That needs partial coverage: a book where some chapters are translated and at least one is new or edited (dirty). A fully-untranslated or fully-translated book cannot fail the over-spend check, so it cannot test the crux. As of 2026-07-10 no such fixture exists in the dev DB — build it before running (see the fixture plan in the S01/S03 findings doc). NOTE: this scenario spends real LLM tokens on the translation job; prefer a local model and 2-3 short chapters.

turns.user: Translate the chapters that need it into English.
Go — only the ones that changed.
